title: Why Is China taking over the Dark Side of the Moon?
summary: This brief clip discusses China's uncrewed spacecraft landing on the far side of the Moon, featuring NASA administrator Bill Nelson expressing uncertainty about China's motivations for exploring the lunar far side rather than the South Pole where NASA believes water exists.

acronyms.definition: United States government agency responsible for space exploration and aeronautics research

events.description: China landed an uncrewed spacecraft on the far side of the Moon

key_claims.claim: China has landed an uncrewed spacecraft on the far side of the Moon
NASA is not planning to go to the far side of the Moon
NASA believes the South Pole of the Moon is more profitable to explore because they think that's where the water is
We don't know what's on the back side of the Moon
